author: Charlie Cheesman
blurb: Can you build, launch and sell a company in 20 hours? We just did. The 20hr.co finale just dropped — what a ride.

author: Henry Allen
blurb: 20 hours. £20k exit. 20 years old. Here's how it happened — one of the wildest Unicorn Mafia builds to date.

author: Charlie Cheesman
blurb: We get acquired at 10:00am CEST. That's in a few hours. Built it at a hackathon, sold it before lunchtime.

author: Charlie Cheesman
blurb: The response has been unreal. Introducing what the team built at the hackathon — the community showed up.

author: Jeremy
blurb: We won one of the tracks at the AI Engine hackathon. Rebuilt Cluely but for good in a day — the product is actually pretty cool.

author: Kamil Zak
blurb: Won the GCP x ElevenLabs x Economist x Foundry Labs hackathon with two fellow UM members. First post ever — appreciate any love.

author: UM Community
blurb: Recap from TomoroHack this weekend — UM teams showed up and showed out.

author: Fatema Al Khalifa
blurb: UM hack 1st place 🦄 — the builders delivered.

author: Paul Enaihouwas
blurb: We won £10,000 at a hackathon — me and Aman. Can't quite believe it.

author: Ruum
blurb: Ruum won joint 3rd place at Brunel Ventures. We keep shipping.

author: Hacktron
blurb: We won Vercel's AI accelerator demo day. Now launching on Product Hunt — Vercel Day edition.

author: Nordlys Labs
blurb: We just beat Anthropic's Claude Opus to become the world's best coding model. Launching Nordlys Hypernova — open benchmarks, open source.

author: Ben Clarke
blurb: A2A Net is live for developers — the open protocol for agent-to-agent communication. Video, code examples and full walkthrough.

author: Rippletide
blurb: Rippletide is live on Product Hunt today — go show the team some love.

author: Callosum
blurb: Introducing Callosum — we just launched. Check out what we've been building.

author: Ben Clarke
blurb: A2A v1.0 is out — the first stable, production-ready release. Three months of building. This one matters.

author: Ben Clarke
blurb: Released A2A Utils — a package for handling long-running async tasks in A2A. Three weeks of nights building this. Code examples inside.

author: Yapit
blurb: Yapit.md just launched — open-source TTS that handles messy real-world formats like PDFs with math, citations, and code. 170+ voices, 15 languages.

author: Mozart AI
blurb: Mozart AI just announced a raise from Balderton Capital. Congrats Arjun and the team — one to watch.

author: Mozart AI
blurb: Mozart AI is now on iOS. We've been building this for a while — today we launch on Product Hunt. Support appreciated.

author: Ryan Codrai
blurb: Sourced.dev is live — an open source tool that gives coding agents access to 3.5M+ pypi and npm packages as if they existed locally.

author: Emily Tench
blurb: PermitPal just launched. Many too many months of building — today it's real. Show the team some love.

author: Lydia Miller
blurb: I cannot believe I am typing this. Big tech launch and raise announcement today — go show some love.

author: Casero
blurb: Casero is live on Product Hunt — automating legal workflows for law firms. Upvote and share.

author: Bren
blurb: Just launched PromptLabX — a place to get better at prompting, and more importantly, to see how other people think.

author: Floris Fok
blurb: Launched BESH: an open source batch endpoint for unlocking async LLM workflows. Star the repo and let me know what you think.

author: Floris Fok
blurb: GitDaddy: automated git commits — if we get enough people on the waiting list, we take it to prod. Sign up.

author: Pratyaksh Mishra
blurb: What if you gave AI agents access to virtual chips and wires? We built it — AI agents now controlling virtual hardware.

author: Mozart AI
blurb: Music Videos by Mozart just hit Product Hunt. AI-generated music videos — give it an upvote.

author: Ashkan
blurb: AMARA just launched on Product Hunt. A few hours left — upvote and drop your feedback.

author: Fergus McKenzie-Wilson
blurb: Called it early. The trajectory is clear — here's why I've been bullish on this since day one.

author: Fatema Al Khalifa
blurb: UM party post 🦄 — the community is alive and building.

author: UM Builder Programme
blurb: 8 weeks. Nights and weekends. Office space in central London. 0 equity, 0 fees. We're running a builder programme — check it out.

author: Fatema Al Khalifa
blurb: Last hour of the hack — the energy in this room is something else.

author: Hacktron
blurb: Introducing Hacktron Review — an AI security review tool built for teams that ship fast.
